# platformInfraInsertNodeAtPath

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformInfraInsertNodeAtPath mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.platformInfraInsertNodeAtPath({ input: '<PlatformInfraInsertNodeAtPathInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

